title: Delicate Crispy Egyptian Beef Kebabs
description: A diabetic-friendly Egyptian dish featuring crispy beef kebabs cooked in a copper pot, perfect for a delicious dinner

ingredients.name: beef strips
ingredients.notes: fatty cuts like ribeye or brisket work well

instructions: Preheat the copper pot over medium-high heat
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper
Add the beef strips to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the marinated beef strips onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Wrap each skewer in a sheet of papillote paper, making sure to seal the edges tightly
Place the skewers in the preheated copper pot and cook for 5 minutes on each side
Remove the skewers from the pot and let them rest for 2 minutes before serving
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro
